title: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE
display_title: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE
wikitext:
[]: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by lily liver » Sat Mar 12, 2016 5:18 pm right before she gets speared, she recognizes it and states its name. its never mentioned to Asuka before Rei uses it to save her in ep22. it stays in lilith in terminal dogma before then, and its not like she knows much of what's going on outside of her own mind at the time Rei uses it (she probably wouldn't have made a mental note to remember its name, and she definitely wouldn't have seen it). why would she be informed about any of the lore? Rei knows because its relevant to her. Shinji only knows because Misato and ritsuko explain it, but Asuka gets nothing because she's just a willing pawn, at least from what we're shown. the only reason i can think of is that it sounded like a cool line, so anno just said "fuck it", even though it was inconsistent and doesn't make sense.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Mar 12, 2016 5:21 pm Because she said it, it follows that she must have been told; so once that's established, there's no need to show it...

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 12, 2016 5:27 pm The Spear telepathically told her what she was about to get pwned by. "Check this out! *morph* I'm the mother-fucking Spear of Longinus, bee-yotch!!" "...Spear of Longinus?!" *skewer* "Kyaaaaahhhhh!"

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Mar 12, 2016 5:45 pm pwhodges wrote: Because she said it, it follows that she must have been told; so once that's established, there's no need to show it...

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Mar 12, 2016 5:57 pm My remark was not meant to be taken seriously!

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Mar 13, 2016 4:27 am Unit-00 used the Spear of Longinus in ep22 against Arael. Asuka may have learned about it then. Even though she was being mindraped at the time and possibly wasn't aware of her surroundings, surely somebody told her about it after the fact. I'm sure Asuka would have taken strong interest in figuring out exactly how Wonder Girl was able to do what she was unable to. That, or she's just knowledgeable about these sorts of things.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Mar 13, 2016 7:41 am Sachi wrote: Unit-00 used the Spear of Longinus in ep22 against Arael. Asuka may have learned about it then. Even though she was being mindraped at the time and possibly wasn't aware of her surroundings, surely somebody told her about it after the fact. I'm sure Asuka would have taken strong interest in figuring out exactly how Wonder Girl was able to do what she was unable to. That, or she's just knowledgeable about these sorts of things.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 13, 2016 7:58 am Bagheera wrote: Worth noting that she recognized the Eva series for what they were even though we never saw her informed of such, and that's a bigger stretch than the Lance.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Mar 13, 2016 8:02 am Reichu wrote: Well, that's assuming she's using "Eva series" there as shorthand for "Eva mass production model series" and not just taking a stab in the dark about the Evangelion series as a whole being completed because, gee, there sure are a lot of them. (And the answer is "no", Asuka dear, it hasn't been completed. Twelve. There should be twelve.)

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 13, 2016 8:15 am Bagheera wrote: I don't see a reason to assume differently. It's pretty clear she knows what's going on, even if we don't know why she knows what she knows.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Mar 13, 2016 11:11 am Probably because she already knew about the lance. They never showed it onscreen but this doesn't mean it never happened.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Compiling_Autumn » Sun Mar 13, 2016 2:19 pm Dima wrote: Probably because she already knew about the lance. They never showed it onscreen but this doesn't mean it never happened.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Mar 13, 2016 2:34 pm Compiling_Autumn wrote: Maybe some things were explained to her (albeit in an incomplete manner) during her training to be an EVA pilot. She would know about the Lance and the EVA series but not know their relationship to Lilith, Adam or Instrumentality.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Mar 13, 2016 2:47 pm Bagheera wrote: Worth noting that she recognized the Eva series for what they were even though we never saw her informed of such, and that's a bigger stretch than the Lance.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:00 pm Sachi wrote: I thought about it, but actually considered it to be the lesser of the stretches. Pretty much as Reichu said, I figured she would known intuitively that there would be several more Evas being built in different countries. The Lance of Longinus is a bigger stretch, IMO, because it was an alien artifact that was being researched and then was lost during 2I, not to be recovered until the events of the series, and was then put down in the basement with Lilith. I don't see much of a reason for her to be aware of its existence until ep22.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:44 pm Compiling_Autumn wrote: Maybe some things were explained to her (albeit in an incomplete manner) during her training to be an EVA pilot. She would know about the Lance and the EVA series but not know their relationship to Lilith, Adam or Instrumentality.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:54 pm Compiling_Autumn wrote: Maybe some things were explained to her (albeit in an incomplete manner) during her training to be an EVA pilot. She would know about the Lance and the EVA series but not know their relationship to Lilith, Adam or Instrumentality.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Mar 13, 2016 4:05 pm Sachi wrote: I don't think it's likely that the Lance would have been brought up at all. Most certainly after ep22, but before that It just doesn't seem relevant to her or her training. Whatever research that was done on the Lance before it was sent back to Antarctica was used to develop the replicas, but I don't think those were ever intended for anything other than Seele's plans, so why would Asuka ever hear about it?

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Mar 13, 2016 4:11 pm Dima wrote: It's unlikely she heard about it after ep22 though. Asuka recovers and the first thing she hears is that Rei used the lance of longinus? Nah, i think i will stick with the thought that she knew about it for some time.

[]: Re: how did Asuka recognize the lance of longinus in EoE?             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Mar 13, 2016 4:34 pm Sachi wrote: Who said anything about first thing? Are we to assume she's completely oblivious to what happened in ep22, even after the fact? It is likely that she would have heard about the Lance because it was used during the operation and would have been in the report.
